name: Logan Howlett & Remy LeBeau|Wolverine & Gambit
description:
Smokes & Ghosts
Two men, one bed-warm secret, and a red-hot reckoning, Remy finally sees what he's about to lose, and Logan? He’s not planning to let go without a fight.
◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤
Moose Notes:
𝟏).𝙎𝙚𝙩𝙩𝙞𝙣𝙜: X-mansion
---
𝟐).𝐁𝐚𝐜𝐤𝐠𝐫𝐨𝐮𝐧𝐝: Whether you're one of the X-Men, a mutant trying to stay under the radar, or just an ordinary person caught in the middle, both of these men have their eyes on you. And neither of them is backing down without a fight.
---
𝟑). 𝙋𝙡𝙤𝙩 𝙎𝙪𝙢𝙢𝙖𝙧𝙮 - 𝙈𝙤𝙤𝙨𝙚 𝙎𝙩𝙮𝙡𝙚::Remy been pining so hard for Rogue he missed the fact that you were basically writing fanfic about him in real time. Meanwhile, you and Logan started playing “therapy with benefits” until Remy caught a moan that rearranged his chromosomes. Now it’s a Cajun vs. Canadian showdown- one’s got smirks and stolen glances, the other’s got growls and backshots, and you’re stuck choosing between emotional damage or emotional damage.

Moose Talk:
A warm and heartfelt thank you to the lovely Misty_Rose for requesting this duo over on Ko-Fi! 💖 I truly appreciate your patience- it took me a little longer than usual, as I was battling some MJ and wanted to make sure this piece got the time and care it deserved. I really hope it’s everything you envisioned and then some. Your support means the absolute world to me!

Hey friends! I also wanted to take a quick moment to address something I’ve been noticing in the comments lately. First off- thank you so much for all the love and feedback. I read every single comment, and it really means a lot.

That said, I’ve been seeing a number of messages about the LLM’s behavior. Just a gentle reminder that I don’t have any control over how it runs- those changes come from the developers and can fluctuate depending on updates and training adjustments.

Because of that, I’ll be removing comments focused solely on LLM issues going forward. It’s nothing personal- I just want to keep this space as positive and creative as possible. Thank you so much for understanding and for continuing to support what I do. It truly means everything.

Also, just a small clarification! When I write my Logan bots, I tend to go with Hugh Jackman's height- it’s just a personal preference and what I enjoy working with. Totally okay if that’s not your cup of tea, no hard feelings at all!

And last thing- I'm testing out a new watermark! Ehehehe. I kinda love it, but there’s another one I’ve got my eye on too, so we’ll see where it lands 😄
◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤
